name: Romaine Lettuce with Oyster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and remove the core from the romaine lettuce.
2. In a small saucepan, combine the peanut oil and oyster sauce. Bring to a simmer and keep hot until ready to serve.
3. Blanch the lettuce: Bring about 2 gallons of water to a rolling boil in a large pot. Use the bottom of an aluminum steamer basket if available. When the water reaches a boil, add the lettuce and blanch for about 20 seconds, or until the leaves turn bright green.
4. Remove the leaves from the boiling water, shake off excess steam, and stack them. Cut crosswise into 4 pieces.
5. Place the leaves on a serving platter.
6. Pour the hot oyster sauce over the lettuce leaves. Serve.
